display.purpose: Screen titles on route pages (Dashboard, Transactions).

label.purpose: Buttons, inputs, badges, table headers — default 12px control text.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Button and input state transitions (transition-all on controls).

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; font-family: "Inter Variable", sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.982 0.018 155.826); background: oklch(0.527 0.154 150.069); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.527 0.154 150.069), transparent 20%); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; font-family: "Inter Variable", sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 2rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; font-family: "Inter Variable", sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Badge
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-family: "Inter Variable", sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.982 0.018 155.826); background: oklch(0.527 0.154 150.069); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: App shell navigation — active state uses accent on brand.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-family: "Inter Variable", sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-icon { color: oklch(0.527 0.154 150.069); font-size: 1rem; }

components.name: Data Table Header
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-collapse: collapse; font-family: "Inter Variable", sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-th { padding: 0.75rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; text-align: left; background: oklch(0.97 0 0 / 0.4); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-th-right { text-align: right; }

narrative.overview: Zai reads like a personal finance workbench on a desktop: squared edges, tight type, neutral surfaces, and one Growth Green accent that marks action and brand — never decoration. Data tables, sidebar navigation, and form drawers carry the product; there is no marketing chrome inside the shell.
keyCharacteristics: Single sans family (Inter Variable) at compact sizes
Squared interactive controls on Lyra/shadcn primitives
Growth Green accent on ≤10% of any screen
Depth via 1px borders and tonal steps, not drop shadows
Sidebar app shell with icon-collapsible rail
Dark mode parity on all semantic tokens

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Growth Green appears on primary CTAs, brand, and key active states only. If green is everywhere, it stops meaning "go."

rules.name: The True Neutral Rule
rules.body: Body background stays achromatic (chroma 0). Warmth lives in the accent and category color dots, not cream-tinted page bg.

rules.name: The Compact Default Rule
rules.body: Interactive UI defaults to text-xs (12px). Scale up for page titles only; never shrink below 12px for readable data.

rules.name: The Flat Table Rule
rules.body: Transaction and category tables use border + muted header band. No card wrapper around tables unless the section truly needs grouping.

dos: Do lead screens with the number or table the user came for.
Do use Growth Green sparingly for primary actions and brand.
Do keep controls at 32px height and 12px type unless the element is a page title.
Do use borders and muted bands to separate regions.
Do support dark mode with the paired .dark token set.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for non-essential transitions.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS dashboards: identical card grids, gradient heroes, eyebrow kickers, hero-metric templates.
Don't add decorative motion, glass chrome, or marketing-page patterns inside the app shell.
Don't use border-left/right >1px colored stripes on rows, alerts, or cards.
Don't tint the page background warm cream/sand — stay achromatic neutral.
Don't wrap every section in nested cards.
Don't use gradient text or neon chart colors as default semantics.
